news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights top investment themes amid market volatility, citing geopolitical and economic challenges like the Iran-Israel conflict and rupee depreciation.
Top stock picks include SBI, ICICI Bank, BEL, IndiGo, Titan, TVS Motor, Groww, and Dixon Tech; Nifty 50 offers value at a 15% P/E discount.

news.title:
Nomura maintains Neutral on Bharat Electronics with a target of Rs 435, citing strong FY26 order inflow of Rs 301bn.
Expected 12%/9% YoY 4QFY26 revenue/EBITDA growth, but valuation concerns at 45x/39x FY27/28E limit upside.
news.summary:
Nomura maintains Neutral on Bharat Electronics with a target of Rs 435, citing strong FY26 order inflow of Rs 301bn.
Expected 12%/9% YoY 4QFY26 revenue/EBITDA growth, but valuation concerns at 45x/39x FY27/28E limit upside.

news.title:
CLSA maintains Outperform on Bharat Electronics, raising target price to Rs 522.
65% FY26 order inflow, $6.5bn orders expected; key catalysts: QRSAM, S-400, 5th-gen fighter bids.
news.summary:
CLSA maintains Outperform on Bharat Electronics, raising target price to Rs 522.
65% FY26 order inflow, $6.5bn orders expected; key catalysts: QRSAM, S-400, 5th-gen fighter bids.

news.title: Goldman Sachs retains Buy on Bharat Electronics with a revised target of 475.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs retains Buy on Bharat Electronics with a revised target of 475.

news.title:
BEL secures mega orders, boosting its market prospects.
Govt intervenes to control ATF price hike, aiding related sectors.
news.summary:
BEL secures mega orders, boosting its market prospects.
Govt intervenes to control ATF price hike, aiding related sectors.

news.title:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.
news.summary:
Systematix flags a bearish Nifty trend in April, with 21,700-22,000 as critical support. Pharma emerges as a standout sector.
Bullish stocks include Astral, Aurobindo Pharma, Sun Pharma, Glenmark, Nalco, and Oil India. ICICI Prudential Life and BEL show bearish setups.

news.title:
BEL's FY26 revenue rose 16.2% YoY to ₹26,750 crore.
Orders secured totaled ₹30,000 crore, including ₹346 million in exports.
news.summary:
BEL's FY26 revenue rose 16.2% YoY to ₹26,750 crore.
Orders secured totaled ₹30,000 crore, including ₹346 million in exports.

news.title:
Bharat Electronics posted a record turnover of Rs 26,750 Cr in FY25-26, up 16.2%.
Export sales grew 33.7% to $141.9M; order book stands at Rs 74,000 Cr.
news.summary:
Bharat Electronics posted a record turnover of Rs 26,750 Cr in FY25-26, up 16.2%.
Export sales grew 33.7% to $141.9M; order book stands at Rs 74,000 Cr.

news.title:
Defence index surged 7%, led by GRSE (+19%), Cochin Shipyard (+15%), and Mazagon Dock (+13.5%). BEL secured ₹6,795 crore contracts.
GRSE FY26 revenue grew 26% YoY; Midhani reported 12.3% YoY growth. Analysts favor BEL, Midhani, and Solar Industries for strong execution.
news.summary:
Defence index surged 7%, led by GRSE (+19%), Cochin Shipyard (+15%), and Mazagon Dock (+13.5%). BEL secured ₹6,795 crore contracts.
GRSE FY26 revenue grew 26% YoY; Midhani reported 12.3% YoY growth. Analysts favor BEL, Midhani, and Solar Industries for strong execution.

news.title:
BEL shares surged 7% after winning a ₹1,950 crore Defence Ministry contract for mountain radars.
Analysts remain bullish on BEL, citing strong fundamentals, indigenization efforts, and technical uptrend.
news.summary:
BEL shares surged 7% after winning a ₹1,950 crore Defence Ministry contract for mountain radars.
Analysts remain bullish on BEL, citing strong fundamentals, indigenization efforts, and technical uptrend.

news.title:
Sensex surged 1,880 pts; Nifty crossed 22,900 on easing geopolitical tensions and strong domestic cues.
BSE MidCap, SmallCap gained ~3.6%; Valor Estate, Texmaco Rail, Bharat Electronics rose on major deals/orders.
news.summary:
Sensex surged 1,880 pts; Nifty crossed 22,900 on easing geopolitical tensions and strong domestic cues.
BSE MidCap, SmallCap gained ~3.6%; Valor Estate, Texmaco Rail, Bharat Electronics rose on major deals/orders.

news.title:
Morgan Stanley maintains Overweight rating on Bharat Electronics.
Target price for Bharat Electronics set at ₹508 by Morgan Stanley.
news.summary:
Morgan Stanley maintains Overweight rating on Bharat Electronics.
Target price for Bharat Electronics set at ₹508 by Morgan Stanley.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal highlights defence sector growth; BEL, Bharat Dynamics are top picks, supported by robust order books and indigenisation.
BEL sees 18% revenue CAGR (FY25-28), while Bharat Dynamics focuses on deep indigenisation, capex, and export growth under India's defence push.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal highlights defence sector growth; BEL, Bharat Dynamics are top picks, supported by robust order books and indigenisation.
BEL sees 18% revenue CAGR (FY25-28), while Bharat Dynamics focuses on deep indigenisation, capex, and export growth under India's defence push.

news.title:
ONGC achieves gas monetization in Daman Project; Tata Chemicals hits 1M tonnes soda ash production.
BEL secures ₹1660 crore orders; NTPC Green Energy signs MoU with PTC India for renewable energy sales.
news.summary:

Orders include radars, avionics, electronic fuzes, and strategic components.

news.title:
Defence Ministry and Bharat Electronics sign a ₹19.5B contract for Mountain Radars for IAF.
The deal aims to enhance the Indian Air Force's operational capabilities.

news.title:
ICICI Securities highlights India's defence sector as a long-term play, with HAL among top picks due to strong growth visibility and order pipeline.
BEL, BDL, and niche players like PTC Industries may benefit from rising capex, exports, and localisation in tech-driven defence manufacturing.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities highlights India's defence sector as a long-term play, with HAL among top picks due to strong growth visibility and order pipeline.
BEL, BDL, and niche players like PTC Industries may benefit from rising capex, exports, and localisation in tech-driven defence manufacturing.

news.title: BEL secures orders worth ₹1,660 crore since March 17, 2026 update.
news.summary: BEL secures orders worth ₹1,660 crore since March 17, 2026 update.

news.title:
Bharat Electronics Ltd (BEL) secures additional orders worth Rs. 1660 Cr post last disclosure on 17th March 2026.
Key orders include satellite communication, electronic warfare systems, avionics, munitions, and strategic components.
news.summary:
Bharat Electronics Ltd (BEL) secures additional orders worth Rs. 1660 Cr post last disclosure on 17th March 2026.
